---
title: "Audio Reporting"
---

I stumbled into audio journalism on accident when one of my friends at The Daily Northwestern asked me to cobyline an audio story with her. Audio reporting opens up opportunities for audiences to immerse themselves in a story, and it's a tool I've found useful for reaching new people. 

[A look into The Daily's coverage of the Deering Meadow encampment](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2024/04/27/campus/deering-encampment/a-look-into-the-dailys-pro-palestine-encampment-coverage/)

![Behind the scenes of one of my audio stories for Medill on the Hill. (Photo credit to fellow reporter Ben Shapiro)](audiopic.jpeg){width="40%"}
